positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a whimsical forest scene. The composition features a prominent, gently curving silhouette of ancient oak trees and delicate glowing fireflies forming a swirling pattern. In the center, a serene patch of stylized mossy ground holds a small, abstract glowing crystal. The overall color palette is deep indigo, emerald green, and accented with ethereal cyan and soft gold luminescence. Style should be inspired by modern botanical etching combined with vaporwave minimalism. Clean lines, strong contrast between the dark silhouettes and the glowing elements. Perfect for single-color screen printing on fabric.
negative: photorealistic, detailed face, people, blurry, artifacts, grain, noise, watermark, signature, text, logo, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, complex textures, messy, overdraw, distracting elements
